name: Ankha
houseDescription: Pyramid roof exterior with golden sarcophagus and royal antiques inside — dramatic and unmistakable.
description: Regal, mysterious, and iconic. Her house is a set piece players love to rebuild on Harv’s Island.

seo.title: Ankha — Snooty cat
seo.description: Regal, mysterious, and iconic. Her house is a set piece players love to rebuild on Harv’s Island.

acnh.intro: Ankha is a snooty cat in the. She first appeared in as an islander, and after being absent in, she appears in all subsequent games as a villager. Her name is likely derived from the '' '', which is the Egyptian hieroglyphic character that reads ''life''. Her Japanese catchphrase, ''kufufu'', is a combination of the Pharaoh, and ''ufufu'', a Japanese onomatopoeia for laughter. Egyptians worshiped cats and had a cat goddess,, which may be the basis for Ankha's design.
acnh.appearance: Golden cat with Egyptian flair—bold eyeliner energy and a home that feels like a desert palace.
acnh.personality: Regal and a little mysterious—Ankha carries herself like desert royalty, then softens when you respect her style. Her home feels like a set piece worth touring.

villagerInfo.quote: All that glitters is not gold.

house.musicNote: Does not contain a stereo initially
